name: DragDrop
title: DragDrop — Syntax 1: For ListBox, PictureListBox, ListView, and Tab controls

parameters.label: source
parameters.documentation: DragObject by value (a reference to the control being dragged)

parameters.documentation: Integer by value (the index of the target ListView item)

parameters.label: source
parameters.documentation: DragObject by value (a reference to the control being dragged)

parameters.label: handle
parameters.documentation: Long by value (the handle of the target TreeView item)

name: DragDrop
title: DragDrop — Syntax 3: For CheckBox and CommandButton controls

parameters.label: source
parameters.documentation: DragObject by value (a reference to the control being dragged)

parameters.label: xpos
parameters.documentation: Integer by value (the horizontal drop coordinate)
